---
title: "IgScan workflow for bulk NGS data."
author: 
  name: Ian Márquez-López
  email: iamarquez@recerca.clinic.cat
  affiliation: Fundació de Recerca Clínic Barcelona-Institut d’Investigacions Biomèdiques August Pi i Sunyer (FRCB-IDIBAPS)
date: 'Compiled: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")`'
output:
  rmarkdown::html_vignette:
    toc_float: true
package: IgScan
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{IgScan BulkNGS}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, results="hide", message=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(error=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE)
library(IgScan)
```
